title: Entrepreneurship Training
description: Train the muscle to deliver ideas to the world!

scenes.title: Entrepreneurship Dojo
scenes.content: This training builds the muscle of asking 'whose problem do I solve?' more than business techniques. Start small — take one step that delights a real person.

scenes.title: Find Problems
scenes.content: Good businesses come from problems. Note three tiny daily inconveniences from family, friends, or yourself. That's your treasure map.

scenes.title: Ideation
scenes.content: Force at least three ideas per problem. AI brainstorming partners scale this 10x.
scenes.highlight:
Ideation rules:
- Quantity
- No judging
- Combine

scenes.title: Who's it For?
scenes.content: 'Sakura, age 13, soccer club' — describe one specific user vividly. 'For everyone' lands with no one.

scenes.title: Prototype Training
scenes.content: Skip perfection. Paper or AI-made screens are fine. The faster someone sees it, the closer you get to a real solution.
scenes.highlight:
Prototype rule:
- Build in 3 days
- Show people
- Iterate

scenes.title: Business Model
scenes.content: Who pays, how much, what costs you. Three lines on paper reveal whether it's actually a business.
scenes.highlight:
3 questions:
- Who pays?
- How much?
- What's the cost?

scenes.title: First Customer
scenes.content: Start with family or friends. Even without money, hearing 'thanks' or 'I want more' is your first proof.
scenes.highlight:
First milestone:
- Someone used it
- They thanked you
- They want more

scenes.speech: Great training! Take your idea to the world 🌟
scenes.title: Training Complete!
scenes.content: Don't try to start big. World-changing companies grow from countless small experiments. Try one of today's ideas today.
